items.title_en: This is what it costs investors to stay in cash — and what to do instead

items.desc_zh: 贝莱德最近的一项分析显示，与债券相比，投资者用现金留下的收入有多少。

items.title_en: FanDuel CEO Amy Howe is out after five years at the sportsbook
items.title_zh: FanDuel 首席执行官艾米·豪 (Amy Howe) 在体育博彩公司工作五年后离职
items.desc_en: Howe has overseen FanDuel during a time of dramatic expansion in sports gambling and as prediction markets have exploded in popularity.
items.desc_zh: 在体育博彩急剧扩张和预测市场迅速普及的时期，豪负责监管 FanDuel。

items.title_en: AMD's Su explains what's behind massive forecast change as stock roars 17% on earnings
items.title_zh: AMD 的 Su 解释了预测大幅变化背后的原因，股价因盈利而飙升 17%
items.desc_en: CEO Lisa Su highlighted the growing demand for central processing units, doubling her long-term forecast after strong first-quarter earnings.
items.desc_zh: 首席执行官苏姿丰强调了对中央处理器不断增长的需求，在第一季度盈利强劲后，她将长期预测提高了一倍。

items.desc_en: Claims from last year said the tech firm’s advertising of Apple Intelligence fooled iPhone buyers.

items.title_en: Vivek Ramaswamy wins Republican nomination for Ohio governor
items.title_zh: 维韦克·拉马斯瓦米赢得俄亥俄州州长共和党提名
items.desc_en: He spent much of the race criticising the state's response to the Covid-19 pandemic led by the Democrat nominee.
items.desc_zh: 他在竞选的大部分时间里批评该州对民主党候选人领导的Covid-19大流行的反应。

items.title_en: 'Nothing will bring back my son': How 10 minutes of bombing by Israel shattered lives in Lebanon

items.desc_en: The bombs started falling at 14:15 in the afternoon - bringing chaos and destruction across the country.
items.desc_zh: 炸弹于下午 14 点 15 分开始落下，给全国带来混乱和破坏。

items.desc_zh: DNA测试正在进行中，以确认鳄鱼体内发现的遗骸是否与失踪男子的遗骸相符。

items.desc_en: Russia demanded a ceasefire on 8 and 9 May but Ukraine said it would pause the fighting sooner, meaning any violations would be pinned on Moscow.
items.desc_zh: 俄罗斯于 5 月 8 日至 9 日要求停火，但乌克兰表示将更早暂停战斗，这意味着任何违规行为都将归咎于莫斯科。
